subcodes.first_line: O blessed souls! Your letter was received and bore greatest glad-tidings that a Spiritual Assembly hath been divinely established [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفوس مبارکه نامه شما رسید و بشارت عظمی داشت که محفل روحانی تاسیس رحمانی
subcodes.subjects: @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick, @martyrs and martyrdom, @eulogies; reminiscences, @education of children; moral education, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
